Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The DECLARE model enforces a structured compliant loan approval workflow through a series of temporal and logical rules

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Here is how the process typically unfolds in practice based on these constraints

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 1 Receive Application The process begins with the customer submitting their loan application This is the mandatory starting point init constraint 1 0 and it must occur at least once existence No other activity can precede it

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 2 Preliminary Credit Check Immediately after intake an initial credit assessment is performed The response constraint ensures this follows the application while exactly one guarantees it happens precisely once

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: This step is critical for risk management without it the bank cannot evaluate basic eligibility

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Step 3 Gather Additional Documents If the credit check reveals gaps for example missing income verification additional documents are collected
